calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-13-2022 Continued To Oct-17-22 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 502

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Holly Matin, Esq. of Bauman Law P.C. (Tel. 818.285.0227) appeared via Zoom on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiff Jenny Buitrago;
Respondent/Plaintiff Jenny Buitrago appeared via Zoom;
Alice Loh, Esq. of the Law Office of Catherine Walsh (Tel. 925.825.9500) appeared in person on behalf of Appellant/Defendant Joseph Magnello;
Appellant/Defendant Joseph Magnello appeared via Zoom.

This case comes on calendar this date for a trial de novo. All parties/witnesses are sworn.

09:43am Opening statement by Ms. Matin.
09:45am Ms. Loh reserves opening.

09:46am The Court addresses the exhibits as submitted by both counsel:
Respondent/Plaintiff Jenny Buitrago's Exhbits: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and 6 are admitted by the Court. Ms. Loh objects to Exhibit 7 and 8. Brief argument is held. At the conclusion of argument, the Court admitted Exhibit 7 for the limited purpose of the amount of the chiropratic bills. Ruling on Exhibit 8 is deferred.
09:54am Appellant/Defendant Joseph Magnello's Exhibits: 1 through 10 are admitted. No objection by Ms. Matin. (Note: Ms. Loh submitted Appellant/Defendant Joseph Magnello's Exhibits in open court.)

09:55am Respondent/Plaintiff Jenny Buitrago is called to testify on her own behalf. Direct examination by Ms. Matin commences.
10:26am Cross-examiniation by Ms. Loh.
10:38am Redirect examination by Ms. Matin.
10:41am No further questions. No other witnesses. Respondent/Plaintiff rests.

10:42am Opening statement by Ms. Loh.
10:47am Appellant/Defendant Joseph Magnello is called to testify on his own behalf. Direct examination by Ms. Loh commences.
11:14am Cross-examiniation by Ms. Matin.
11:25am No further questions. Appellant/Defendant rests.

11:26am Respondent/Plaintiff Jenny Buitrago is questioned by the Court.
11:31am Appellant/Defendant Joseph Magnello is questioned by the Court.

11:32am Closing argument by Ms. Matin.
11:36am Closing argument by Ms. Loh.
11:38am Further closing argument by Ms. Matin. 11:39am Final comment by Ms. Buitrago.
11:41am Respondent/Plaintiff Jenny Buitrago's Exhbit 8 is admitted into evidence.

11:42am The matter is taken under submission. The exhibits as submitted are retained by the Court.
Judge: Jeffrey S. Ross. Clerk: J. Alameda. Matter not reported. (502)
